ui.heroTitle: A vivid world from one small seed.
ui.heroDescription: Generate a geography atlas, explore its biomes, and inspect the climate beneath every cell. The world streams in chunk by chunk, stores preferences locally, and loads no engine or map resources until you enter. Game mode keeps the camera centered on the explorer; dev mode unlocks survey controls.
ui.standaloneDescription: Stream an infinite local world. Nothing leaves your browser.
ui.placeholder: PixiJS, the generation worker, content definitions, and terrain resources are waiting behind the button.
ui.standalonePlaceholder: The renderer, worker, and world data load on demand.
ui.devModeEnabled: Battle shadow, fast move, shift-click teleport, free camera, zoom, and equipment testing are enabled.
ui.footerControls: WASD or arrows walk. Hold Shift to run. E or Space acts. In game mode, the camera follows the explorer and zoom stays locked. The minimap fills as you discover the world.
ui.footerControlsStandalone: WASD or arrows walk. Hold Shift to run. E or Space acts. Drag pans the camera. Scroll zooms. The minimap fills as you discover chunks.
ui.footerControlsDev: In dev mode, drag pans the camera, scroll zooms, press F for fast move, shift-click teleports, and the in-game panel exposes equipment overrides.
ui.gameStartError: The world could not be started.
ui.saveDescription: Manage snapshots stored only in this browser. Autosaves, manual saves, and imports stay separate.

devPanel.heading: Dev Mode
devPanel.tabMovementHint: Movement cheats, fog reveal, fast travel, and traversal debug toggles.
devPanel.tabWorldHint: World visibility, minimap, day-night, and light tuning controls.
devPanel.tabGearHint: Swap explorer equipment and weapon slots for quick testing.
devPanel.note: Unchecked battle shadow reveals all fog. Grid is a dev-only guide. Shift-click teleports. F toggles fast move. G toggles flight. Disable day / night to tune light manually from midnight to noon.
devPanel.teleportBlocked: Cannot teleport to ({x}, {y}); terrain is blocked.

actions.noTarget: {explorerName} uses {actionName}, but nothing is within reach.

core:deep-ocean.name: Deep Ocean
core:deep-ocean.description: Abyssal water far from continental shelves.

core:ocean.name: Open Ocean
core:ocean.description: Open navigable sea beyond the continental shelf.

core:coast.name: Coast
core:coast.description: Beaches, tidal margins, barrier strands, and immediate shore.

core:lake.name: Lake
core:lake.description: An inland waterbody disconnected from the world edge.

core:beach.name: Beach
core:beach.description: A sandy shore where dry land eases into sea or lake water.

core:basin.name: Basin
core:basin.description: A low enclosed plain surrounded by higher terrain and trapped drainage.

core:lowland.name: Lowland Plain
core:lowland.description: Low-relief continental plain suited to farming and roads.

core:grassland.name: Grassland
core:grassland.description: Open temperate grass country and rolling prairie.

core:forest.name: Forest
core:forest.description: Dense moist woodland and mixed forest.

core:desert.name: Desert
core:desert.description: Hot arid terrain with sparse vegetation and shifting sands.

core:wetland.name: Wetland
core:wetland.description: Low saturated ground near lakeshores, floodplains, and backswamps.

core:highland.name: Highland
core:highland.description: Elevated broken upland between plains and major mountains.

core:bare-rock.name: Bare Rock
core:bare-rock.description: Exposed bedrock, scree, and hard dry slopes.

core:mountain.name: Mountain
core:mountain.description: Very high rugged relief with steep slopes and passes.

core:snow.name: Snowfield
core:snow.description: Frozen alpine terrain with seasonal or persistent snow cover.

core:tundra.name: Tundra
core:tundra.description: Cold treeless ground of high latitude or high elevation margins.

core:savanna.name: Savanna
core:savanna.description: Warm seasonal grassland with scattered trees.

core:rainforest.name: Rainforest
core:rainforest.description: Hot humid closed-canopy forest with very high biomass.

core:marsh.name: Marsh
core:marsh.description: Flat warm wetland of reeds, peat, and shallow standing water.

core:plateau.name: Plateau
core:plateau.description: High flat-topped country with abrupt scarps and broad tablelands.

core:canyon.name: Canyonlands
core:canyon.description: Deeply incised dry terrain of mesas, buttes, and gorge walls.

core:reef.name: Coral Reef
core:reef.description: Warm shallow marine shelf with coral structures and lagoons.

core:oasis.name: Oasis
core:oasis.description: Rare desert water pocket supporting palms, gardens, and rest stops.

core:volcano.name: Volcanic Field
core:volcano.description: Young volcanic cone, caldera rim, or ash-darkened lava country.

core:glacier.name: Glacier
core:glacier.description: Moving or persistent land ice descending from high cold accumulation zones.

core:interact.name: Interact
core:interact.description: Inspect or use the nearest reachable landmark.

core:ready.name: Ready
core:ready.description: Briefly ready the active equipment without selecting a target.

core:explorer.name: Wayfinder
core:explorer.description: A balanced configurable explorer used by the first playable character.

core:beacon-keeper.name: Beacon Keeper
core:beacon-keeper.description: An authored-area NPC using the same abilities, appearance, and equipment model.

core:shore-raider.name: Shore Raider
core:shore-raider.description: A hostile archetype proving enemies share the complete character system.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.description: Capacity for movement and committed actions.

focus.name: Focus
focus.description: Capacity for techniques, study, and ritual concentration.

poise.name: Poise
poise.description: Innate resistance to interruption before equipment.

resolve.name: Resolve
resolve.description: Capacity to withstand fear, pressure, and doubt.

wayfinder.name: Wayfinder
wayfinder.description: A frontier navigator trained in observation and campcraft.

riverWarden.name: River Warden
riverWarden.description: A keeper of crossings, boats, flood signs, and wetland routes.

passSentinel.name: Pass Sentinel
passSentinel.description: A mountain-route guard accustomed to cold, slopes, and polearms.

archiveScholar.name: Archive Scholar
archiveScholar.description: A reader of records, languages, ruins, and civic memory.

fieldPhysician.name: Field Physician
fieldPhysician.description: A practical healer versed in diagnosis, remedies, and local plants.

craftArtisan.name: Craft Artisan
craftArtisan.description: A maker and repairer who reads materials as carefully as maps.

caravanCourier.name: Caravan Courier
caravanCourier.description: A road-wise traveler trained in logistics and negotiation.

ritualAdept.name: Ritual Adept
ritualAdept.description: A disciplined keeper of rites, sites, and difficult concentration.

jian.name: Jian
jian.description: A balanced double-edged sword for precise cuts and thrusts.

dao.name: Dao
dao.description: A practical single-edged blade favoring committed cuts.

qiang.name: Qiang
qiang.description: A spear family built around reach and line control.

gun.name: Gun Staff
gun.description: A long staff for control, travel, and blunt techniques.

bow.name: Bow
bow.description: A ranged weapon shaped by sightlines, draw strength, and arrows.

crossbow.name: Crossbow
crossbow.description: A mechanical ranged weapon with deliberate reloads and bolts.

fieldTool.name: Field Tool
fieldTool.description: An axe or hammer that serves both craft and high-impact defense.

short.name: Short Weapon
short.description: A light close-range weapon used as a compact backup.

travelCloth.name: Travel Cloth
travelCloth.description: Breathable layered clothing for mobility and long journeys.

lacqueredScale.name: Lacquered Scale
lacqueredScale.description: Weather-resistant leather scales balancing protection and motion.

ironLamellar.name: Iron Lamellar
ironLamellar.description: Laced iron plates offering heavy protection at substantial load.

ceremonialHeavy.name: Ceremonial Heavy Armor
ceremonialHeavy.description: Protective display armor whose authority comes with weight and heat.

remedy.name: Remedy
remedy.description: Prepared medicine for injury, illness, or exposure.

provision.name: Provision
provision.description: Portable food, water, and travel supplies.

tool.name: Tool
tool.description: Reusable equipment that grants practical capabilities.

ritual.name: Ritual Object
ritual.description: An object used to focus, record, or perform a rite.

document.name: Document
document.description: A map, letter, contract, formula, or historical record.

material.name: Material
material.description: A substance retained for construction, repair, or craft.

core:wayfinder-isle.name: Wayfinder Isle
core:wayfinder-isle.description: A small authored island demonstrating reusable terrain patches and landmarks.

core:wayfinder-beacon.name: Wayfinder Beacon
core:wayfinder-beacon.description: A weathered signal tower at the island's high point.

core:terrain-showcase.name: Terrain Showcase
core:terrain-showcase.description: A dev-only authored area that places every core terrain type near the origin.

core:terrain-showcase-marker.name: Terrain Showcase Marker
core:terrain-showcase-marker.description: A dev-only marker for the all-terrain showcase area.
